# promptcraft

> Rules, agents, skills, and configs for AI coding assistants — Claude Code, Cursor, ChatGPT. Tool-agnostic universal content under `shared/`, tool-specific adaptations under `tools/`.

A reference library meant for humans and AI assistants to browse, copy, and adapt. Not a package or runtime — nothing is installed.

## Entry points

- [README.md](README.md): human-facing entry point with persona-based routing.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): contributor instructions per [agents.md](https://agents.md) convention — read this before editing the repo.
- [ADOPTION.md](ADOPTION.md): step-by-step guide to copying content into your own assistant setup.
- [CONVENTIONS.md](CONVENTIONS.md): file naming, structure, link format conventions used throughout.
- [DECISIONS.md](DECISIONS.md): rationale for the current structure.

## Universal content (shared/)

Tool-agnostic — applies to any AI coding assistant.

- [shared/principles/](shared/principles/): communication style, tool safety, agent design, prompting examples, CLI tool design, personal conventions.
- [shared/languages/](shared/languages/): TypeScript, Python, Bash, Java, Go, general cross-language standards.
- [shared/infrastructure/](shared/infrastructure/): Terraform, Kubernetes/Helm, Docker, AWS, Ansible, cost optimization.
- [shared/workflows/](shared/workflows/): CI/CD patterns, GitHub Actions, version management.
- [shared/quality/](shared/quality/): code quality, documentation, research standards.

## Claude Code (tools/claude/)

- [tools/claude/guides/](tools/claude/guides/): end-to-end guides — best practices, hooks, skills, agents, PR review, learning systems, GHA integration, MCP management.
- [tools/claude/templates/](tools/claude/templates/): starter files — agent templates, skill templates, rule file templates, project-level doc templates.
- [tools/claude/examples/](tools/claude/examples/): complete reference `.claude/` directory — hooks, agents, rules, skills, evals, config, docs.
- [tools/claude/scaffolding/](tools/claude/scaffolding/): ready-to-copy `.claude/` skeleton for a new repo.
- [tools/claude/specs/](tools/claude/specs/): RFC-style specifications (CI/CD standard).

## Cursor (tools/cursor/)

- [tools/cursor/rules/user/](tools/cursor/rules/user/): markdown for Cursor's User Rules UI (Settings → Rules).
- [tools/cursor/rules/mdc/](tools/cursor/rules/mdc/): `.mdc` files for `.cursor/rules/` project-rule directories.
- [tools/cursor/mcp/](tools/cursor/mcp/): MCP server configuration for Cursor.
- [tools/cursor/recovery/](tools/cursor/recovery/): utility to recover conversation history across workspaces.

## ChatGPT (tools/chatgpt/)

- [tools/chatgpt/global/](tools/chatgpt/global/): Custom Instructions for Settings → Personalization (apply globally).
- [tools/chatgpt/projects/](tools/chatgpt/projects/): Project-scoped instructions for specific stacks.
- [tools/chatgpt/implementation-guide.md](tools/chatgpt/implementation-guide.md): setup walkthrough.

## Repo contributor config (.claude/)

- [.claude/README.md](.claude/README.md): explains that `.claude/` is contributor config — not example content.
- [.claude/CLAUDE.md](.claude/CLAUDE.md): project instructions loaded when editing promptcraft itself.
- [.claude/rules/](.claude/rules/): contributor rules (PII, git, content quality, operational).
- [.claude/hooks/](.claude/hooks/): live safety hooks dogfooded from `tools/claude/examples/hooks/`.

## Optional

- [docs/index.html](docs/index.html): GitHub social preview card. **Do not edit without a Pages plan.**
- [.github/](.github/): CI workflows, issue/PR templates.
